refined_caption: A rodent is visible in the hospital room, next to a patient's bed. The rodent appears to be in close proximity to the bed.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in my hospital room, right next to my bed. This is completely unacceptable and I'm worried about my health and safety. I demand that the hospital takes immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: There's a rat in my hospital room, right next to my bed, this is disgusting and I'm really concerned about my health.
